channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cockroaches will learn to fear my SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable
item.description: A little robotic switch-flipper has become my sidekick in combating cockroaches. Before I got the SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable, I'd tiptoe through the dark every morning, hoping I wouldn't step on one of those terrible bugs scurrying around as I made my way to the light switch across the room. Now I'm ready for battle before […]

item.title: This Ugreen NASync DH2300 deal delivers the 'perfect starter NAS' for home offices
item.description: 2-bay, 4K HDMI, 4GB RAM, diskless and ready to set up in minutes — we reviewed this one and it’s the perfect entry point into personal cloud storage.

item.title: Le Galaxy Z Fold 8 change totalement de format : les futurs pliables de Samsung ont fuité
item.description: Deux semaines avant l'Unpacked du 22 juillet, les rendus officiels des trois pliables de Samsung ont fuité. Et la vraie nouveauté, c'est un Galaxy Z Fold 8 plus large qui n'a plus grand-chose du Fold qu'on connaît.

item.title: Waymo will soon go fully autonomous in four more cities
item.description: Waymo will ditch human supervisors in San Diego, Las Vegas, Tampa and Denver.

item.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
item.description: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.

item.title: If Microsoft sold off Xbox, who would even buy it?
item.description: This week, Microsoft took a huge ax to its Xbox business. The company announced that it would be laying off 1,600 workers now, 1,600 more over the next fiscal year, and that it would be shedding four studios. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma hasn't been shy about why she's making such dramatic cuts, saying in a […]

item.title: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro is a great travel companion, and it’s on sale for $40
item.description: If you’ve got a summer trip coming up, the last-gen Twelve South AirFly Pro is one of those gadgets that can make a long flight feel a little shorter. It lets you use your wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems, and right now it’s on sale for $39.99 ($15 off) at Amazon. That’s the best […]

item.title: The Zyxel GS1915-24EP 24-port smart switch declutters your home network with 12 PoE+ ports and a 130W power budget — and it’s under $200 at Newegg
item.description: Packed with 24 Gigabit ports, 12 PoE+ connections, and Nebula cloud management, the Zyxel GS1915-24EP smart switch is on sale for just $199.99.

item.title: La Steam Machine de Valve peut faire tourner Windows et SteamOS en même temps : voici comment
item.description: Valve a beau ne pas avoir prévu de dual-boot officiel sur la Steam Machine, rien ne vous empêche de faire cohabiter SteamOS et Windows. J'ai testé la manip : elle est bricolée, mais elle marche.

item.title: I’m a computer expert, so trust me when I say this Dell 14 laptop deal is unmissable — save $530 on a Core 7 model with 16GB RAM and a 1TB SSD
item.description: Priced at a staggering $699.99, this is Dell's lowest priced 14-inch laptop right now.

item.title: La mise à jour de ChatGPT qu’on attendait tous : l’IA parle désormais comme un être humain, c’est bluffant
item.description: OpenAI dévoile GPT-Live-1 et GPT-Live-1 mini, deux nouveaux modèles destinés à améliorer les échanges vocaux avec ChatGPT. Selon la start-up, les modèles doivent enfin rapprocher les conversations avec l'IA d'un échange naturel avec un humain. Les démonstrations sont particulièrement convaincantes.

item.title: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
item.description: OpenAI is overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause mid-conversation. During a press briefing, OpenAI research lead Kundan Kumar called GPT-Live-1 the company's […]

item.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
item.description: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

item.title: I reviewed Sony's new mid-range Dolby Atmos soundar, and while I love some features, overall its one step forward and two steps back
item.description: Sony’s midrange Dolby Atmos soundbar delivers clarity, power, and simplicity, but I found myself wishing for more.

item.title: ‘In Formula 1, the success goes to the teams that have the best teamwork and the best technology’: I found out how Atlassian is helping Williams F1 be more productive, efficient and collaborative than ever before
item.description: Atlassian and Williams F1 are seeing major improvements in effectiveness and efficiency - and it's all thanks to AI.

item.title: ChatGPT’s ‘smartest voice model ever’ is rolling out to everyone today — and GPT-Live-1 gives you more natural conversations without interruptions
item.description: OpenAI is introducing a better voice mode for ChatGPT that sounds more natural and allows for simultaneous translation.

item.title: Google announces new 'Video Remix' feature its for AI subscribers
item.description: It allows you to reimagine videos stored in Google Photos using Gemini Omni.

item.title: ChatGPT's new voice mode will slow down if you tell it to
item.description: OpenAI's new voice mode for ChatGPT will acknowledge you as you speak, and slow down if you ask it to.

item.title: Samsung's 'absolutely stellar' 2TB 990 Pro SSD earned a 5-star review from us — and it's just got a massive discount at Amazon
item.description: The 2TB Samsung 990 Pro boasts some of the fastest read/write performance of any PCIe 4.0 SSD we’ve ever tested.

item.title: Three things every leader must do to hold the line against AI decision-making
item.description: The leaders who keep their edge will be the ones who resist the temptation to hand over judgments to machines. When the leader of a legal-tech startup began using ChatGPT, he started by doing what most of us do – embracing the new technology’s ability to take over some of the smaller, more tedious parts of the job. But within a few months, the AI model had gone from an assistant that helped with emails to the highest source of authority in the company....

item.title: Upgrade your agonizingly slow home office internet with TP-Link's Wi-Fi 7 Deco BE25 mesh router system — Amazon just dropped the price on the three-pack if you want to stop your video calls freezing
item.description: I love the AI Roaming, up to 6,000 sq ft of coverage, and Wi-Fi 7 speeds across three nodes.

item.title: De Beef à One Piece : pourquoi Netflix n’arrive plus à garder ses spectateurs d’une saison à l’autre
item.description: Netflix cartonne avec les premières saisons de ses séries, puis regarde une bonne partie de son public déserter la deuxième. Le problème est assez sérieux pour que la plateforme lance ses propres enquêtes internes.

item.title: Faut-il déjà oublier l’iPhone pliante ? Pourquoi l’iPhone 18 Pro s’annonce bien plus impressionnant
item.description: Alors que les rumeurs s'excitent autour d'un potentiel modèle pliant chez Apple, les véritables innovations technologiques de la rentrée 2026 pourraient bien se concentrer sur l'iPhone 18 Pro. Entre un appareil photo repensé et des composants gravés d'une finesse inédite, la future vedette de la marque à la pomme se dévoile en avance.

item.title: Meilleures batteries plug and play pour panneaux solaires : comment bien choisir et les modèles qu’on recommande
item.description: Vos panneaux solaires produisent en pleine journée, quand personne n'est à la maison, et tout ce surplus part gratuitement chez EDF ? Une batterie solaire le récupère pour vous le rendre le soir. Plug and play, posée sur une simple prise, elle est devenue le moyen le plus simple de rentabiliser ses panneaux solaires. Voici comment bien la choisir, et les modèles qu'on recommande après les avoir testés. ...

item.title: Amazon is reportedly working on a more powerful agentic Alexa assistant
item.description: Amazon is working on a project codenamed 'Moonraker' that would enable the AI assistant to handle multi-step tasks more effectively.

item.title: Anker's Laptop Power Bank can charge all your devices at once (yes, even your laptop) — and it's just got a big summer price cut, so you can even keep working on the beach
item.description: You’ll never need to carry a separate cable again.

item.title: Crypto VC firm Paradigm raises $1.2B to invest in ‘technical frontier’ startups
item.description: For Paradigm, the technical frontier will stretch beyond its cryptocurrency investment roots. This fund is expected to expand its investment focus to include robotics and AI.

item.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
item.description: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

item.title: Another massive data breach exposed millions of driver’s license numbers
item.description: The cyberattack targeting a U.S. insurance giant is the largest known breach of driver's license numbers so far in 2026.

item.title: Official renders for Samsung's Galaxy Z Flip 8, Watch 9, Watch 2 Ultra and Z Fold 8 leak
item.description: Renders of multiple new Samsung devices have arrived a few weeks before the company's next Unpacked event.

item.title: Le patron de Sony vend 56 % de ses actions deux jours après l’annonce de la fin des jeux PlayStation physiques
item.description: Deux jours après avoir acté la fin des jeux PlayStation sur disque, le patron de Sony a vendu plus de la moitié de ses actions. Le timing tombe mal.

item.title: 5 things to expect at Samsung Galaxy Unpacked — from foldable phones to Samsung’s first smart glasses
item.description: Samsung is holding an event on July 22, where we're expecting to see loads of new phones and wearables.

item.title: Gemini débarque sur la clé b.tv de Bouygues Telecom : ce qui change pour votre téléviseur
item.description: Bouygues Telecom déploie l'assistant Gemini de Google sur sa clé b.tv. Un bouton micro sur la télécommande, et l'IA répond à vos questions sur grand écran.

item.title: How Polymarket plans to win back America’s trust after 4 years in exile
item.description: The prediction market platform is launching a campaign with the help of social media influencers. After four years in exile, the prediction market platform Polymarket has begun a well-funded campaign to sell a new version of itself to the American public.To do so, the company is trying to convince policymakers, regulators, the public and prospective customers that the business it is building onshore is a more disciplined operation than the freewheeling offshore exchange that has at times been the subject of unfavorable headlines.Polymarket has hired social media influencers to produce viral m...

item.title: La Steam Machine peut faire tourner Windows 11, mais vous ne devriez pas l’installer
item.description: Valve publie les pilotes Windows officiels pour sa Steam Machine. Utiliser Windows sur le petit cube de salon, c'est désormais possible. Mais ça vous coûtera l'intégralité de SteamOS, sans possibilité de garder les deux pour l'instant.

item.title: Test de la batterie Jackery SolarVault 3 Pro Max : installation plug and play et raccordement solaire
item.description: Connu pour ses batteries portables, Jackery se lance dans la batterie de maison avec la gamme SolarVault 3. Le modèle Pro Max se branche soi-même, sans installateur, et accepte jusqu'à 4 000 W de panneaux en direct. On l'a testée !

item.title: Sonos is finally improving its app — but it's not moving fast enough, so people are building new alternatives to solve big gripes about home theater setups and more customizable sound
item.description: Sonos users are making their own alternatives to the official app and sharing them on the Sonos subreddit

item.title: Steam aurait dépassé les 200 millions de joueurs, loin devant PlayStation
item.description: Valve ne communique pas sur le nombre d'utilisateurs actifs de Steam mais un calcul d'analyste nous permet d'estimer à quel point la plateforme domine le marché face aux consoles.

item.title: The Sony ULT Field 7 party speaker finally got a steep discount post-Prime Day
item.description: The Sony ULT Field 7 party speaker is on sale at Amazon for just $348 instead of the usual $499.99. But act fast, as stock is running low.

item.title: These AI startups are growing revenue at faster and faster rates
item.description: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.
